# Capri DAM — Headless Digital Asset Management Platform

> Concise summary for LLM agents. For full implementation details, see `llms-full.txt`.

## What This System Is
Capri DAM is an enterprise-grade **Headless Digital Asset Management (DAM)** platform built as a Ruby on Rails + React hybrid monolith. It manages the full lifecycle of digital assets (images, video, documents) for enterprise marketing operations — from ingestion and metadata enrichment to approval workflows, smart collection routing via AI vectors, and CDN delivery.

---

## Tech Stack (Authoritative)
- **Backend:** Ruby on Rails 8.1 (not API-only — hybrid monolith serving HTML shells + JSON API)
- **Language:** Ruby 4.0.3
- **Frontend:** React 19 + Material UI v9 + Emotion 11 (mounted via `data-view` DOM attributes)
- **Database:** PostgreSQL 14+ with `pgvector` (1536-dim HNSW index) and `pgcrypto` extensions
- **Background Jobs:** Sidekiq + Redis (strict queue weighting)
- **Auth:** Devise (session) + Doorkeeper (OAuth2) + OmniAuth Keycloak (SSO)
- **Storage:** ActiveStorage abstraction → Local disk (dev) / AWS S3 (prod)
- **AI:** pgvector `neighbor` gem for cosine similarity semantic search; Python FastAPI gateway for embedding generation (`http://localhost:8000/api/embed_query`)
- **Image Processing:** MiniMagick (ImageMagick wrapper) + RTesseract (OCR)
- **Email:** Liquid-templated email engine via `EmailTemplate` model + `EmailDispatcherWorker`
- **GraphQL:** `graphql` gem with schema at `/graphql` (dev explorer: `/graphiql`)
- **REST API:** `/api/v1/` documented via rswag/Swagger at `/api-docs`
- **CDN:** Pluggable CDN adapters (Akamai EdgeGrid included); invalidation via `CdnInvalidationWorker`
- **Reports:** Prawn (PDF) + caxlsx (Excel)

---

## Architecture Pattern
**Hybrid Monolith** — Rails handles routing and serves standard HTML views. React 19 components are mounted into specific DOM nodes identified by `data-view` attributes in `application.js`. No separate SPA repo. All code lives in one repository.

**Route Namespaces:**
- `/api/v1/` — Core REST API consumed by React (assets, folders, collections, search, workflows, notifications)
- `/graphql` — GraphQL endpoint (queries: `assetDetail`, `searchAssets`, `collections`, `collection`)
- `/admin/` — System operations (users, groups, reports, email templates, system status)
- `/ai/` — AI Copilot, Agents, Batch UIs

---

## Core Domain Models

### Asset
- UUID primary key (`uuid` column, also has `id` bigint)
- `status` enum: `draft(0)`, `pending(1)`, `processing(2)`, `ready(3)`, `in_review(4)`, `approved(5)`, `rejected(6)`, `failed(7)`
- `properties` JSONB: stores `original_filename`, `content_type`, `size`, `checksum_sha256`, `width`, `height`, `color_palette`, `extracted_text`, `usage_terms`, `alt_text`, `tags`, `editor_state`, `storage_path`, etc.
- Soft-deletable via `deleted_at` (SoftDeletable concern)
- After commit: publishes `asset.needs_embedding` event to Redis channel `ai_gateway_events`
- Belongs to: `User`, `Folder` (optional), `AssetVersion` (active_version pointer)
- Has many: `AssetVersions`, `WorkflowInstances`, `CollectionAssets`, `Collections`
- Has one: `AssetEmbedding` (pgvector, 1536-dim)

### AssetVersion
- Immutable snapshot per save/edit
- `action_type`: `initial_upload`, `image_edit`, `cloned_edit`, `branched_edit`
- `properties` JSONB: `storage_path`, `content_type`, `size`, `checksum_sha256`, `width`, `height`, `color_palette`, `extracted_text`, `processed_at`, `editor_state`
- Physical file via ActiveStorage (`has_one_attached :file`)

### Folder
- Self-referential hierarchy (`parent_id`)
- `path_hierarchy` method returns breadcrumb array for React
- Soft-deletable; slug auto-generated from name
- `governing_groups` returns UserGroups with FolderPolicies attached

### FolderPolicy (RBAC)
- Per-folder, per-UserGroup access rules
- Boolean columns: `read_access`, `write_access`, `delete_access`, `manage_access`, `approval_flow`, `explicit_deny`
- `explicit_deny = true` overrides all other grants (short-circuit deny)
- Users inherit permissions from parent groups via `UserGroupClosure` closure table (zero-recursion query)

### Collection (Workspace)
- `collection_type`: `manual` | `smart`
- `expires_at` — TTL for campaign lifecycle auto-archival
- `properties` JSONB (via `store_accessor`): `tags[]`, `allowed_groups[]`, `denied_groups[]`
- ABAC: `denied_groups` checked first (explicit deny), then `allowed_groups` whitelist
- `accessible_by?(user)` enforces group-based access
- `compliance_violations` detects `Internal Use Only` assets in external collections and license expiry mismatches

### CollectionRule (Smart Routing Brain)
- Belongs to a `smart` Collection
- `semantic_prompt` — natural language description (e.g., "Summer campaign beach assets")
- `similarity_threshold` — cosine similarity cutoff (0–1, default 0.800)
- `metadata_filters` JSONB — hard guardrails (e.g., `{"status": "approved"}`)
- Processed asynchronously by `SmartCollectionRouterWorker`

### User
- Roles: `viewer` (default), `editor`, `admin`
- Devise auth + OmniAuth Keycloak SSO (`provider`/`uid`)
- `permissions_for(folder)` — returns `{read, write, delete, manage, approve}` hash
- `effective_group_ids` — resolves inherited groups via closure table in one query
- `active_for_authentication?` — blocks deactivated users

### Workflow
- `trigger_type`: `on_upload` (and others)
- `folder_scope`: `all` | `specific`; `target_folder_ids[]`, `exclude_folder_ids[]`
- `status` enum: `inactive(0)`, `active(1)`, `draft(2)`
- Active workflows require at least one `WorkflowStep`

---

## Key Background Workers (Sidekiq)
| Worker | Queue | Purpose |
|--------|-------|---------|
| `AssetProcessorWorker` | `ingest` | Extracts metadata (MIME, dimensions, SHA256, OCR, color palette), stores physical file, marks asset `ready`, triggers workflow |
| `SmartCollectionRouterWorker` | `smartai` | Cosine similarity matching against active CollectionRules via pgvector |
| `AssetWorkflowTriggerWorker` | `workflow` | Evaluates which Workflows apply to a newly processed asset |
| `WorkflowInitiatorWorker` | `workflow` | Creates WorkflowInstance + WorkflowTask records |
| `WorkflowEngineWorker` | `workflow` | Advances workflow state on task submission |
| `CdnInvalidationWorker` | `default` | Purges CDN edge cache |
| `EdgeMetadataSyncWorker` | `default` | Syncs asset metadata to CDN edge KV store |
| `EmailDispatcherWorker` | `mailers` | Renders Liquid template + delivers email |
| `TaskNotificationWorker` | `notifications` | Creates in-app notifications for workflow tasks |
| `TrashCleanupWorker` | `ingest` | Permanently purges soft-deleted assets after TTL |
| `IngestionWorker` | `ingest` | Processes IngestionItem records from bulk imports |
| `PreFlightAnalysisWorker` | `ingest` | Duplicate/compliance check before bulk ingestion |

**Queue Priority:** `mailers` > `notifications` > `default` > `workflow` > `metadata` > `reports` > `ingest` > `smartai`

---

## Key API Endpoints

### Assets (`/api/v1/assets`)
- `POST /` — Upload → creates Asset + AssetVersion V1 → dispatches workers
- `DELETE /:id` — Soft delete (moves to bin)
- `POST /:id/restore` — Restore from bin
- `DELETE /:id/permanent` — Permanently delete all versions + physical files
- `GET /bin` — List trashed assets and folders
- `POST /:id/process_image` — Image editor: modes `new` (fork), `overwrite`, `version` (branch)
- `GET /:id/versions` — Version history
- `GET /:id/audit_trail` — Audit trail
- `POST /:id/versions/:version_id/restore` — Restore a specific version
- `GET /:id/watermarked` — Returns watermarked image blob
- `GET /local/:uuid` — Serve local development file
- `POST /check_hashes` — Duplicate detection via SHA256 checksums
- `GET /:id/workflow_history` — Active workflow tasks

### Collections (`/api/v1/collections/:slug`)
- CRUD + bulk operations
- `POST /:slug/rule` — Configure smart routing rule
- `POST /simulate_rule` — Preview rule matches
- `GET /:slug/cluster_map` — 2D UMAP projection of asset embeddings
- Asset membership and pin management

### Search (`/api/v1/search`)
- Lexical on `title` + `original_filename`
- Mode filter: `images` | `files`
- Dynamic JSONB property filters via extra query params
- Returns facets for React UI

### Copilot (`/api/v1/copilot/search`)
- POST `query` text → Python AI Gateway → pgvector HNSW search → top 20 assets

### GraphQL (`/graphql`)
- `assetDetail(uuid)`, `searchAssets(query, mode, metadataFilters)`, `collections`, `collection(slug)`

---

## Design Patterns
1. **SoftDeletable concern** — `deleted_at` column; `.active` and `.trashed` scopes on Asset and Folder
2. **Auditable concern** — Audit tracking on User model
3. **JSONB properties** — All flexible metadata in `properties` JSONB (not separate columns)
4. **Closure table** — `UserGroupClosure` for O(1) ancestor group resolution
5. **Hybrid auth** — `authenticate_hybrid!` accepts Devise session OR Doorkeeper Bearer token
6. **AssetUrlHelper** — Resolves correct asset URL (local vs CDN) based on environment
7. **Liquid templating** — Email templates use Shopify Liquid; payload deeply stringified before render

---

## Terminology Reference
| Term | Meaning |
|------|---------|
| DAM | Digital Asset Management |
| TDM | Technical Debt Management (ingestion compliance scanning) |
| TTL | Time-To-Live (`expires_at` on collections — campaign lifecycle) |
| ABAC | Attribute-Based Access Control (allowed_groups / denied_groups on Collections) |
| RBAC | Role-Based Access Control (FolderPolicies per UserGroup) |
| Pinned | `collection_assets.pinned = true` — manual override, AI won't remove this asset |
| Smart Collection | Collection with a `CollectionRule` (NLP prompt + pgvector cosine similarity) |
| Bin | Soft-deleted recycle bin for assets and folders |
| Baking | MiniMagick physically writes image edits to a new file at save time |
| Versioning | Immutable `AssetVersion` rows; `Asset.active_version_id` is the current pointer |
| Edge KV | CDN edge key-value metadata store synced by `EdgeMetadataSyncWorker` |
